_comment: Per-combo suite for the nwl23 dictionary + english alphabet (the harness defaults). Holds only LANGUAGE-AGNOSTIC levers -- ones meaningful to replicate across dictionaries/languages. Position-specific levers that load .gcg boards live in the 'common' suite (nwl23-english only). Each test is one invocation of libquackle_test --mode=<mode>. Fields: name (unique, names the golden file), mode, args (extra CLI flags), inputs (files staged into the run cwd under the given name), seed (per-test override of the suite seed), digest (compare a sha256 of the output instead of storing it verbatim -- for outputs too large to keep).
